title: Publish K0 Reality Proof as kernel-driven first task
goal: Record the Human Architect init intent, publish K0 Reality Proof through DevTape events, and classify current-main substrate claims by machine evidence.
context: This task corrects bootstrap-only MetaAI intake into a DevTape-first development loop before any K1 product work begins.
required_behavior: Human intent is represented by a DevEvent before task publication
K0 task publication uses DevTaskCreated followed by TaskBroadcasted
Derived board is generated from DevTape before further dispatch decisions
Reality claims without code and test anchors are downgraded to assumptions
No product/runtime truth is read from board, harness, V4 paths, sessions, caches, dashboards, or temporary preview paths
non_goals: Do not implement K1 TISR evidence rails
Do not overwrite the checked-in task board until the board contract is reconciled
Do not introduce a new canonical CAS/hash/WAL/HEAD_t substrate
rollback_plan: Remove the K0 task packet and DevEvent enum addition, then delete ignored local DevTape evidence if the Human Architect rejects this bootstrap correction.
